name: topsec-edr
description: OctoBus package for TopSec EDR (天融信终端威胁防御系统) terminal management, alert statistics, system info, and authenticated API access.

TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/Login.name: login
TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/Login.description: Authenticate to the TopSec EDR management center and obtain a session token.

TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/GetClient.name: get-client
TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/GetClient.description: Get detailed information for a specific terminal by client_id.

TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/GetAlertStats.name: get-alert-stats
TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/GetAlertStats.description: Get threat alert statistics and daily protection data.

TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/GetSystemView.name: get-system-view
TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/GetSystemView.description: Get system overview: terminal counts, license, server info.

TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/GetSystemInfo.name: get-system-info
TopSec_EDR.TopSec_EDR/GetSystemInfo.description: Get system resource usage: CPU, memory, disk, network.
